assertions.title: 搜索框中按 Space 输入空格字符

steps.expected: AppSnapshot reflects Search view with HeaderSearch focus
steps.observed: AppSnapshot created with view=Search, ui_focus=HeaderSearch, toast=None, help_visible=false (default)
rx.try_recv() returned SearchInputChar { c: ' ' }, rx.try_recv() after returned Err (no more commands)

evidence.testCode: Test constructs App { view: Search, ui_focus: HeaderSearch, ..default }, creates KeyEvent with KeyCode::Char(' '), asserts rx.try_recv() matches SearchInputChar { c: ' ' } and rx.try_recv().is_err() (no other commands). This verifies no PlayerTogglePause or ToastDismiss is sent.

assertions.title: 搜索框中按 Space 不触发播放/暂停

steps.expected: AppSnapshot reflects Search view with HeaderSearch focus
steps.observed: AppSnapshot created with view=Search, ui_focus=HeaderSearch, toast=None

steps.expected: No PlayerTogglePause in any sent command
steps.observed: While draining rx with try_recv(), no PlayerTogglePause found. Only SearchInputChar { c: ' ' } was sent.

evidence.testCode: Test constructs App { view: Search, ui_focus: HeaderSearch }, sends Space key, then iterates ALL received commands via while let Ok(cmd) = rx.try_recv(), asserting !matches!(cmd, PlayerTogglePause) for each. This exhaustively verifies no PlayerTogglePause is sent.

assertions.title: 非搜索焦点时 Space 仍为播放/暂停

evidence.testCode: Test iterates over all three focus positions [BodyCenter, BodyLeft, BodyRight] with view=Search. For each, it sends Space key and asserts rx.try_recv() matches PlayerTogglePause AND rx.try_recv().is_err() (no other commands). Covers all three non-search-focus cases in a single test function.

assertions.title: 歌单页中 Space 为播放/暂停

steps.observed: AppSnapshot created with view=Playlists, ui_focus=BodyCenter, toast=None

steps.expected: PlayerTogglePause sent as the only command
steps.observed: rx.try_recv() returned PlayerTogglePause, rx.try_recv() returned Err (no more commands)

evidence.testCode: Test constructs App { view: Playlists, ui_focus: BodyCenter, ..default }, sends Space key, asserts rx.try_recv() matches PlayerTogglePause and rx.try_recv().is_err().

assertions.title: 歌词页中 Space 为播放/暂停

steps.observed: AppSnapshot created with view=Lyrics, ui_focus=BodyCenter, toast=None

steps.expected: PlayerTogglePause sent as the only command
steps.observed: rx.try_recv() returned PlayerTogglePause, rx.try_recv() returned Err (no more commands)

evidence.testCode: Test constructs App { view: Lyrics, ui_focus: BodyCenter, ..default }, sends Space key, asserts rx.try_recv() matches PlayerTogglePause and rx.try_recv().is_err().

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Each assertion has a corresponding unit test in src/ui/tui/keyboard.rs that precisely verifies the specified condition. All tests passed via `cargo test space` (6 tests total including one toast-related space test, all OK).
